titleStmt.title: SII 22.28: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 28. (A.R. No. 28 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. MĀṞAVARMAN. KULAŚĒKHARA I—DATE LOST.

summary.p: The king is given the attribute “who was pleased to take every country”. The inscription is mutilated and incomplete. The date portion preserved is 2*) Stops hereyear ... śu 7, Friday, Aśvati (probably Junuary 16, A.D. 1293). The object of the record is to register a gift of nine mā and odd of land, to the temple of KAlakāladēva by one Saduraṉ Kēśavapperumāḷ of the village ŚeḻuvattUr in Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam after purchasing the same and getting it made tax-free by the Sabhā of TirukkaḍavUr. The land appears to have been previously endowed for a flower garden to a PiḍAri temple by the same donor, and passed on to private ownership subsequent to the 13th year of Perumāḷ Sundara-Pāṇḍya. The details however are not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Em maṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu I
yaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu saptamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatiyum peṟṟa nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭ
ṭu Uṭpaṭaiyeviya tirukkaṭavūr mahāsabhaiyom vivastai Uṭaiyār śrī kālakālatevarkkup pāṇṭimaṇṭala
lūrc ceḻuvaittūruṭaiyāṉ caturaṉ kecavapperumāḷ muṉṉāḷile tiruppūvakkāṭṭup piṭāri koyilukku
tiṉ Aiññūṟṟuvaṉeṉṉum perālc ceyta tiruṉantavaṉattukku nāṅkaḷ Intat tirunantavaṉañ ceykiṟa tiruttoṇ
Appar nilam Iṟaikaḻittup perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkkup patiṉmūṉṟāvatu mutalāka Ūrile Ēṟṟi Iṟu
m kācum Ivarkaḷukku jīvaṉattuk kuṭalāka koṇṭu ponta Itukku Intak keśavapperumāḷ nammūrp piṭākai mummuṭi
tevivatikkuk kiḻakku civapātacekaravāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcaturattu veḷḷaippaṉṟi Eṉṟu perce
ṇiyum Itilkku potiyum Urimaikaḷum Intac caturattuk kalvā yeṉṟu per(r)collappaṭṭa nilam kāle Araimāvu
kaḷum Āka nilam Oṉpatu māmukkāṇiyum comattiyaṉ pacupatipaṭṭaṉ pakkalile Intak kecavap perumāḷ vilaikoṇṭu
ṟamāka Utakam kkaiyil nāṅkaḷ Iṉṉilam Oṉpatu māmukkāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭu Innilattā
Digital edition of SII 22.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
